name: supplyCheck
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (path-3; NOT assassin-enumerated). The page drives this via the artifact-bound /:id/run path; this override exercises the /api/lens/run peel shape. Reads artifact.data.materials OR artifact.data.supplies. RETURNS {lowStock:[{name,currentStock,reorderPoint,supplier}],count,totalItems,needsOrder} — the EXACT keys the Action Result panel (supplyCheck branch) renders. lowStock = currentStock<=reorderPoint (defaults: stock 0, reorder 5). Pure compute, no STATE. Pinned by server/tests/services-lens-macros.test.js.
